author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 18: 2 Tier-3 ipv6 docs (load-bearing for any v6 connectivity). net/ipv6/route.md (FIB6 trie + source-specific routing RFC 6724 + per-flow PMTU/redirect cache + fib6_rules policy routing + ECMP/multipath + RTM_*ROUTE/NEWNEXTHOP wire — 14 REQ / 11 AC, 0 open) + net/ipv6/addrconf.md (RFC 4862 SLAAC + DAD + RFC 4429 optimistic-DAD + RFC 8981 privacy extensions + RFC 7217 stable-privacy + RFC 6724 source-addr-selection + 4 addr_gen_modes + RTM_*ADDR wire + per-iface sysctls — 13 REQ / 12 AC, 0 open). 13 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: ~75 .design docs. Next: net/ipv6/ndisc.md + net/ipv6/icmpv6.md (ND state machine + ICMPv6 — completes the v6-control-plane triangle: route ↔ addrconf ↔ ndisc/icmpv6).
